% check a.php
a.php:22:3: $b is of type: int (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	private static int $bar;

	function do()
	{
		return new class() {
			private string $name;

			function getName(): string
			{
				return $this->name;
			}
		}
	}

	function check()
	{
		$b = self::$bar;
		#debugType $b
	}
}
